response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15+ year requirement with strong technical depth across multiple domains and is currently working on AI infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role requires director-level strategic expertise in AI with demonstrated products and platforms, and Bogdan's AI experience is recent (started April 2025) with no evidence of shipped AI products or recognized AI expertise. Missing Master's/PhD in AI and lacks clear evidence of director-level strategic leadership needed for this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Exceeds 15+ years of software engineering experience with demonstrated technical depth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing recent commitment to AI engineering
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and ability to build complex, long-lived systems
concerns: AI experience is recent (April 2025 start); no demonstrated shipped AI products or platforms, and no recognized expertise in AI field—a core requirement for this strategic role
Missing Master's/PhD in AI, a preferred qualification for director-level AI strategy role; no formal AI/ML education background
Career shows strong individual contributor track record but limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership, cloud platform strategy, or ability to shape organizational AI direction

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI expertise and shipped AI products
